disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intense, relentless itching leading to scratching until the skin breaks and bleeds
trigger_question_examples: How bad has the scratching been?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's the worst itch I've ever had. I scratch until I bleed and I still can't stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rash sits symmetrically in the flexural creases (front of elbows, behind knees) with the groin and underarms spared
trigger_question_examples: Where on your body is the rash?
Is it in any particular spots or all over?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Mostly in the creases of my elbows and behind my knees. My groin and underarms are actually fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Skin is generally very dry, flaky and scaly all over
trigger_question_examples: What does the rest of your skin feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My whole body is really dry and scaly, not just the itchy patches.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Some skin is thickened and leathery from long-term rubbing (wrists and neck)
trigger_question_examples: Is any of the skin thickened or leathery?
Have some areas changed texture from all the rubbing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, my wrists and neck have gone thick and leathery from years of rubbing them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Personal history of hay fever (allergic rhinitis)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have hay fever or any allergies?
Any history of asthma or hay fever?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I do get hay fever, yeah.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Flare began over 48 hours after the weather turned cold and dry; home is heated with a dry heat source and no humidifier
trigger_question_examples: Did anything change just before this flared up?
What is the heating like at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It got bad after the cold snap. My flat has dry heating going all the time and no humidifier.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no blistering, no thick yellow weeping fluid and no honey-coloured crusts on the skin
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, blisters, or yellow crusting or weeping?
Is any area hot, weeping pus, or covered in crusts?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, no blisters, and nothing is weeping or crusting — it's just dry, red and scratched.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A scented moisturizer has been applied with no relief and possibly worsening irritation
trigger_question_examples: What have you been putting on the skin so far?
Are you using any creams or moisturizers?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Just a scented moisturizer from the chemist — it does nothing, if anything it stings.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two days of near-total sleep loss from the nocturnal itch, with exhaustion and irritability
trigger_question_examples: How is this affecting your sleep?
How are you coping day to day?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I literally haven't slept in two days because the itch is worse at night. I'm wrecked and snapping at everyone.
